scores.correctness_notes: Correctly uses temp_model(), deploy(), wait(jubilant.all_active), and shows the combined lambda with all_agents_idle. Minor inaccuracy in the note claiming all_active checks 'active/idle' when it only checks active status (idle is a separate agent state checked by all_agents_idle).
scores.hallucination_notes: jubilant.all_blocked is mentioned but not confirmed to exist in the gold standard. Also states 'jubilant.all_active checks all units are active/idle' which conflates active status with agent idle state — a minor factual inaccuracy.
